Footnote - Book.description: Turabian footnote — book, single author: First Last, *Title* (City: Publisher, Year), page.

Footnote - Subsequent Citation.description: Turabian footnote — subsequent: Last, *Short Title*, page.

Footnote - Ibid.description: Turabian footnote — ibid, same book and page

Footnote - Ibid with Page.description: Turabian footnote — ibid with new page number

Footnote - Chapter in Edited Book.body: ^[${1:First Last}, "${2:Chapter Title}," in *${3:Book Title}*, ed. ${4:Editor Name} (${5:City}: ${6:Publisher}, ${7:Year}), ${8:page}.]
Footnote - Chapter in Edited Book.description: Turabian footnote — chapter in edited book
